subject: [PATCH 2/8] nfsd: hold rcu across localio cmpxchg retry

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server (nfsd) where a freed nfsd_file object's memory is reused, causing a reference count bump to appear successful and leading to dereferencing of freed memory. The fix involves holding RCU read lock across a cmpxchg retry block to prevent the slab page backing the freed nfsd_file from being recycled during the retry. This ensures that the refcount increment operation operates on valid memory.
